title: CLEOPATRA
lyrics:
[Verse]
I wonder if you know
犯した 俺のさ crazy things
Cleopatraはcrying
She know all my terrible things
Unstoppable my dark side
俺 できない stop it
Cleopatraはcrying
She know all my terrible things

[Chorus]
I wonder if you know
I wanna let you know
I wonder if you know
I wonder if you know
I wonder if you know
I wanna let you know
I wonder if you know
I wonder if you know
I wonder
I wonder
I wonder if you know
